question: BTN vs BB SRP on an A-high dry board - optimal default?
reaction_text: Range advantage on dry ace-high boards favors continuation bets, so the default is to barrel small.
goal: Default to a small c-bet when range advantage and dryness align.

question: BTN vs BB SRP on a wet low-connected turn - better default?
reaction_text: Wet textures empower more draws, so checking to control pot and avoid blowups is safer.
goal: Lean toward checking on wet turns when the opponent counters the range well.
